ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dividend_data" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of dividend declared */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield as a percentage */,
  "last_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date of the last dividend payment */,
  "next_dividend_date" TEXT /* Expected date of the next dividend payment */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Record date for dividend payment */,
  "dividend_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dividend payments (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "dividend_policy" TEXT /* Dividend policy of the company */,
  "dividend_sustainability" REAL /* Metric indicating the sustainability of the dividend */,
  "last_dividend_change_date" TEXT /* Date of the last change in the dividend amount */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the dividend is paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_data_ticker_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_symbol") REFERENCES companies ("ticker_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for trading */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the company belongs */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* Fiscal year-end date of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, advisor, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for additional contact information */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the company related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, dividend increase) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert check (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_dividends" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for historical records */,
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated dividend entry */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when dividend was paid */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid on that date */,
  "dividend_type" TEXT /* Type of dividend (e.g., cash, stock) */,
  "dividend_source" TEXT /* Source of the dividend data (e.g., company website, financial news) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_dividends_dividend_id FOREIGN KEY ("dividend_id") REFERENCES dividend_data ("dividend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for analysis records */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "analysis_period" TEXT /* Period for the analysis (e.g., Last 5 Years) */,
  "average_dividend" REAL /* Average dividend paid during the analysis period */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the dividend over the period */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., trend, sustainability) */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for analysis (e.g., moving average, regression) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_analysis_ticker_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_symbol") REFERENCES companies ("ticker_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for notification settings */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom settings apply */,
  "notify_dividend_declared" INTEGER /* Whether to notify when a dividend is declared */,
  "notify_dividend_paid" INTEGER /* Whether to notify when a dividend is paid */,
  "notify_dividend_change" INTEGER /* Whether to notify when there is a change in the dividend amount */,
  "notify_dividend_policy_update" INTEGER /* Whether to notify when the dividend policy is updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for additional context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_related_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for news articles */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company related to the news */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "news_url" TEXT /* URL for the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "news_source" TEXT /* Source of the news (e.g., Reuters, Bloomberg) */,
  "news_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_related_news_ticker_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_symbol") REFERENCES companies ("ticker_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock history record */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded stock price */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "opening_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_history_ticker_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("ticker_symbol") REFERENCES companies ("ticker_symbol")
)
